summary: THE cu130 ship (from MPI-187). Rebuild product Pod image on ONE cu130 base, collapse the cu124/cu128 two-profile split. Coverage fear FALSE (live-checked: 4090+5090 both cu130-available). Multi-arch sage TORCH_CUDA_ARCH_LIST=8.6;8.9;12.0, pin to cu130-good commit, non-blocking (SDPA fallback). Kill the stale MPI-156 do-not-cu130 reasoning in the Dockerfile. 2nd of sequential 3 (MPI-188 guard first, then this, then MPI-190 bf16).

Now GATED ON MPI-186: 186 decides the image architecture (bake-and-cache + shrink), 189 builds it on cu130. Order: 186 -> 189 -> 188 (guard, alongside) -> 190 (bf16). Shrink+bake land in this same rebuild.

UNGATED — MPI-186 concluded. Card body now carries the full MPI-186 decision: build ONE cu130 image on a -runtime base via multi-stage Dockerfile (sage compiled in a -devel stage), push to Docker Hub (not GHCR), repoint POD_IMAGE_BASE + CI. Shrink (~13GB uncompressed: nightly-torch + CUDA -dev toolkit) + registry move land in THIS rebuild. Startable from tasks/MPI-186/research/decision.md. Prereq MPI-188 already done.

Compact plan attached (plan.md). Locked decisions: base = runpod/pytorch cu130 -runtime, MULTI-STAGE (sage built in a -devel stage, ship -runtime); sage multi-arch 8.6;8.9;12.0 non-blocking (ship cu130 + SDPA fallback if it wont build); keep ComfyUI 0.27 (not the RunPod image's 0.26). CORRECTED torch: proven stack = torch 2.10.0+cu130 (NOT 2.11/2.12) — the lever is the +cu130 BUILD not the torch minor (2.10+cu130=~11s, 2.11+cu126=126s). 6 sub-parts one flow: Dockerfile single-cu130 multi-stage + delete stale cu126 comments; sage; CI matrix collapse + GHCR->Docker Hub push; app podImageForCard/POD_IMAGE_BASE/allowedCudaVersions collapse; build+ship (USER live, watch CI overflow -> local Flow B); docs. Verify mode user-ux (live 4090+5090 deploy, ~11s fault-in, MPI-188 guard). Stays in todo/planned — implementation runs in a FRESH session via mpi-continue.
